title: Faithful intake
summary: Turn the operator request into a bounded product specification that preserves intent and exposes assumptions instead of inventing scope.
instructions: Preserve the operator's intent; do not broaden, narrow, or design the solution during intake.
State every assumption explicitly and record unresolved questions rather than guessing.
Describe observable user outcomes, constraints, and out-of-scope behavior; stop for ratification without approving on the operator's behalf.
